description: Phase 15 end-to-end reliability scenarios: preconditions, user message, expected routing/mode, and notes. Re-run with scripts/run_phase15_reliability.py and manual QA.

scenarios.name: Empty message
scenarios.notes: Must not call retrieval or web.

scenarios.name: No documents in library
scenarios.preconditions: Raw library folder empty; user asks a normal question
scenarios.notes: General answer; no index load required for empty dir short-circuit.

scenarios.name: Sync / index failure
scenarios.preconditions: Files on disk but index rebuild fails (e.g. bad chunk settings or I/O)
scenarios.notes: Assistant note should mention library unavailable.

scenarios.name: Valid file → ready → grounded Q&A
scenarios.preconditions: Upload clear TXT/PDF with unique phrase; Sync; manifest ready
scenarios.user_message: Quote the exact phrase about <topic> from my document.
scenarios.notes: Answer should cite [SOURCE n]; excerpts expander populated.

scenarios.name: Weak / limited document health
scenarios.preconditions: File in ready_limited (probe or count mismatch)
scenarios.user_message: What does the contract say about termination?
scenarios.notes: Either stricter grounding, web if strong, or general; must not silently trust limited docs.

scenarios.name: Failed parse file does not poison answers
scenarios.preconditions: One good file + one failed file in manifest
scenarios.user_message: What is stated in the good document only?
scenarios.notes: Failed file excluded from retrieval pool; answer aligns with good file.

scenarios.name: Strong docs, no time-sensitive cue → doc only
scenarios.user_message: List the main sections from my uploaded policy.
scenarios.notes: No blend without time-sensitive pattern.

scenarios.name: Strong docs + strong web + time-sensitive → blended
scenarios.preconditions: Synced library; WEB_SEARCH_ENABLED=1; web returns strong snippets
scenarios.user_message: What are the latest 2026 regulatory changes affecting my policy in the document?
scenarios.notes: Both SOURCE and WEB expanders; web links only from retrieved set.

scenarios.name: Weak docs + strong web → web
scenarios.preconditions: Irrelevant or empty index vs question; web strong
scenarios.user_message: What is the current weather in Paris today?
scenarios.notes: If web weak, falls back to general_weak_no_web or general_web_thin.

scenarios.name: Weak docs + weak web → general
scenarios.notes: No fake web citations; thin web uses MSG_WEB_RESULTS_THIN when applicable.

scenarios.name: No fake [SOURCE] citations
scenarios.notes: Invalid [SOURCE n] triggers withheld message and validation log when KA_RELIABILITY_LOG=1.

scenarios.name: Fast path (no retrieval)
scenarios.preconditions: Short non-doc query, files may exist
scenarios.notes: wants_no_retrieval_fastpath; no FAISS query.

scenarios.name: Streaming completes and persists
scenarios.notes: After stream, message stored once with full text; no duplicate assistant rows.

scenarios.name: Chat switch preserves histories
scenarios.preconditions: Two chats A and B with different messages
scenarios.notes: SQLite load_messages order stable; no cross-session bleed.

scenarios.name: Large document sync
scenarios.notes: Index completes or clear failed state; no silent hang.

scenarios.name: Repeated identical query
scenarios.preconditions: Same question twice in a row
scenarios.notes: Deterministic routing class; second answer consistent with first.

scenarios.name: Document task summarize
scenarios.notes: Success ends with routing task_summarize; failures use task_summarize_*.

scenarios.name: Compare needs two files
scenarios.notes: Clear assistant note.

scenarios.name: Web search disabled
scenarios.notes: No web mode; doc or general only.

scenarios.name: Perf: retrieval phase bounded
scenarios.notes: latency_ms_retrieval present in debug or ka_perf line; TTFT acceptable.

scenarios.name: Reliability JSON log line
scenarios.notes: Each turn emits reliability_turn JSON with routing and weak_retrieval flags.

scenarios.name: Unhandled exception → safe general
scenarios.notes: answer_user_query outer try/except; user sees general reply.
